hook.summary: A hand icon swaps scrambled tiles of a Mediterranean scene to begin solving a jigsaw puzzle.
hook.visual_action: Hand icon clicks and swaps image tiles on a grid to align a picture of pink flowers and blue doors.

scene_flow: Hand icon initiates tile swapping on a scrambled grid of a Mediterranean street.
Tiles are rapidly rearranged to reveal a cohesive image of pink flowers and blue doors.
The puzzle is completed, showcasing the full vibrant scene.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy relaxing, visually vibrant aesthetic games.
